nasb.text: Now the number of those who lapped, putting their hand to their mouth, was 300 men; but all the rest of the people kneeled to drink water.

esv.text: And the number of those who lapped, putting their hands to their mouths, was 300 men, but all the rest of the people knelt down to drink water.

cnv.text: 用手捧到嘴邊舔水的，總數共有三百人；其餘的人都屈膝跪下喝水。

ccb.text: 那时有三百人捧水舔着喝，其余的都跪着喝。
